ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wrestlers" (
  "wrestler_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wrestler */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the wrestler */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the wrestler */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the wrestler is affiliated with */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the wrestler */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the wrestler */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the wrestler */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school of the wrestler */,
  "redshirt" INTEGER /* Redshirt status of the wrestler */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wrestler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the school is part of */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the school competes in */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "wrestler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wrestler */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., SR, JR, SO, FR) */,
  "eligibility_year" INTEGER /* Eligibility year of the wrestler */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_wrestler_id FOREIGN KEY ("wrestler_id") REFERENCES wrestlers ("wrestler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weight_classes" (
  "weight_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight class */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the wrestler */,
  "weight_class" TEXT /* Weight class (e.g., 133, 141, 149) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weight_classes_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "pins" INTEGER /* Number of pins */,
  "tech_falls" INTEGER /* Number of tech falls */,
  "maj_decisions" INTEGER /* Number of major decisions */,
  "total_takedowns" INTEGER /* Total takedowns */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_records_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Current rank */,
  "previous_rank" TEXT /* Previous rank */,
  "rank_date" TEXT /* Date of the rank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranks_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bonus_percentages" (
  "bonus_percentage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bonus percentage */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "bonus_percentage" REAL /* Bonus percentage */,
  "bonus_points" INTEGER /* Bonus points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bonus_percentage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonus_percentages_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "opponent_school" TEXT /* School of the opponent */,
  "opponent_wrestler" TEXT /* Name of the opponent wrestler */,
  "opponent_weight_class" TEXT /* Weight class of the opponent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opponents_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "match_score" TEXT /* Score of the match */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission of the user (e.g., view_wrestlers, edit_wrestlers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_videos" (
  "match_video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match video */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the match video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_videos_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_reports" (
  "match_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match report */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the match report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_reports_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
column_names: ID of the school the wrestler is affiliated with
Conference the school is part of
Type of season (e.g., SR, JR, SO, FR)
Unique identifier for each weight class
Unique identifier for each bonus percentage
Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, administrator)
Unique identifier for each user permission
Permission of the user (e.g., view_wrestlers, edit_wrestlers)
Unique identifier for each match video
Unique identifier for each match report
